(a) Daily chanting of "Rina Vimochana-Angaraka Mantra". Native or
SUfferer should draw a line from a Charcoal and invite all Daridratva
(RinB~ Badhas) in it. Then he should chant the above mantra and
wipe out the line so drawn earlier with his left foot. This may be
done: daiy or on Tuesdays.

(b) 'Sri Narasimha Rina Vimachana Stotra' to be chanted daily for 2·3

(d) For those who cannot afford to do any of the above, they should
